title: IIT Roorkee Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee has released the official notification for 1 Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttarakhand. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate irrespective of category, At least 2 years of post-Master's degree research/teaching experience as evidenced by publications in standard refereed journals
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate irrespective of category. Having at least 2 years of post-Master's degree research/teaching experience, as evidenced by publications in standard refereed journals.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Roorkee to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
